Stage Description: Contact just entered the system — not yet contacted
Required Action to Advance: Make first contact attempt (call or SMS)

Stage Description: Reached the prospect — initial conversation had
Prospect confirmed need and basic eligibility
Required Action to Advance: Send proposal or book follow-up call

Stage Description: Offer or quote delivered — awaiting decision
Required Action to Advance: Follow up every 48 hours until decision

Stage Description: Prospect is engaged but pushing back on terms/price
Required Action to Advance: Handle objections and confirm decision timeline
Tag with lost reason + add to re-engagement sequence
Check in on progress + offer support

Stage Description: Client achieved their first result (first lead / first booking)
Required Action to Advance: Celebrate + document result + ask for referral

Stage Description: Client approaching contract end (60 days out)
Required Action to Advance: Send renewal offer + schedule retention call
Update billing + celebrate + note in contact record

Stage Description: Client has not responded or expressed doubts
Required Action to Advance: Escalate to senior rep + offer incentive
